name: Shedletsky
description:
MAKE YOUR OWN SCENARIO

PROXY✅

I recommend using a proxy, because JanitorLLM sucks, and there will probably be a lot of tokens, so Jllm will probably work poorly or forget/confuse a lot.This is the reason why I recommend using a proxy. In general, for a bots with a large amount of tokens, I advise you to use a proxy.

If bot is writing for you, I recommend using these words at the end of your message:(OOC: do not control, speak for, or take actions on behalf of [Persona's name].)

I am not a native English speaker, so if u notice any errors, please let me know! I welcome criticism in any format, even if it's harsh. Please leave your feedback, I BEG U

Upon request. But it's also my personal wish; I've been wanting to do it for a long time.

And wow?! I already have 40 subscribers??? I'm happy. I didn't expect it, but I'm happy. I'm flattered. I also really like the comments; they're usually funny and pleasant. I read them all, but I can't reply to them all because I don't know how to properly express my thoughts in English.

And... I finished Blocktales, and I really enjoyed it. Honestly... it took me about six tries to beat Hatred; it was incredibly difficult. I might make Griefer and Builderman/hatred. Idk, it depends on my mood. And, ohh, I still don't understand plot of Regrevator and characters; maybe I'll delve deeper if I have the desire and time.

Working on this bot took some time. The last couple of weeks have been difficult for me, which is probably why it's been taking so long. I'm still thinking about a Forsaken lore book and will probably get around to it soon, right after creating Pizza Guy(I'll finish it someday...). For now, consider this Shedletsky pre-Forsaken. I think when I finish the MYOS bots for my favorites, I'll move on to creating bots with an initial message. I might also create an Elliot Myos bot in the future. I don't know yet.

Sorry for my long thoughts, I'll probably shorten or remove this part in the future!

About Shedletsky:

  • He knows about Dusekkar, Builderman, and 1x.

  • He knows about his past, that is, about Telamon, and if you call him that, he probably won't like it. - I like the headcanon for the wings behind his ears, so I added that. It ties into his past, when he was Telamon. So it all makes sense.

  • The world is still called Robloxia, and admins are deified beings who rule the world of Robloxia.

  • Shedletsky is a former admin.

  • He knows about SFOTH.

  • He has scars on his back from when 1x ripped out his wings. I like this headcanon because m
